parameters-en.Open: Sets the level above which the gate "opens," or passes signal through.
parameters-en.Close: Sets the level below which the gate "closes," or stops signal from passing through.
parameters-en.Hold Time: Adjusts the length of time after the signal drops below the Close threshold before it is gated. Increase Hold Time if your playing is chopped off too soon.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls the length of time it takes for the open noise gate to close once the signal drops below the Close level/threshold. Increase Decay if you want the gate to gradually lower the signal instead of chopping it off abruptly.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
